name: Baked Penne with Spinach, Feta and Fontina

ingredients.item: Salt and black pepper, to taste

method: Preheat the oven to 350 F and oil a ceramic or glass baking dish.
Prepare the pasta according to package directions and put it in the prepared baking dish. Toss with 1 tbsp. of the oil.
Meanwhile, put the spinach in a food processor and puree with the garlic, feta, half Parmesan cheese, nutmeg, salt,
and pepper. Stir in half the fontina.
Toss everything in the baking dish. Add the cherry tomatoes and stir. Top with the remaining fontina and Parmesan.
Bake the pasta until the cheese turns golden, 15-20 minutes.
